---
title: "HI_models_agg"
output: html_document
date: "2025-04-14"
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(glmmTMB)
library(tidyverse)
library(performance)
edv <- read.csv("C:/Users/baois/Desktop/URES/ed_data.csv")
hi <- read.csv("C:/Users/baois/Desktop/URES/uresw5/region_daily_weighted_heat_index.csv")
str(edv)
str(hi)

edv <- edv %>%
  mutate(Region = as.integer(str_remove(geo, "Region")),
         Date = as.Date(as.character(temporal), format = "%Y%m%d")) %>%
  select(Region, Date, dataValue) %>%
  rename(ed_visits = dataValue)
hi <- hi %>%
  rename(Region = HHS.Region, heat_index = Region_Weighted_Heat_Index) %>%
  mutate(Date = as.Date(Date)) 

merged <- edv %>%
  inner_join(hi, by = c("Region", "Date"))
str(merged)

merged <- merged %>%
  mutate(
    day_of_year = yday(Date),
    sin_doy = sin(2 * pi * day_of_year / 365),
    cos_doy = cos(2 * pi * day_of_year / 365)
  )

race <- read.csv("C:/Users/baois/Desktop/URES/df_nonwhite.csv")
forest <- read.csv("C:/Users/baois/Desktop/URES/df_forest.csv")
forest <- forest %>%
    filter(`Forest.Type` == "Total Forest")
vulnerbilities <- race %>%
    left_join(forest, by = "HHS.Region") %>%
    select("HHS.Region", "nonwhite_percentage", "Forest.Coverage")
elder <- read.csv("C:/Users/baois/Desktop/URES/df_elderly.csv")
elder <- elder %>%
  group_by(`HHS.Region`) %>%
  summarise(eldery_percentage = mean(eldery_percentage))
vulnerbilities <- vulnerbilities %>%
  left_join(elder, by = "HHS.Region") %>%
  rename(Region = HHS.Region)
merged <- left_join(merged, vulnerbilities, by = "Region")
str(merged)
```

```{r}
library(glmmTMB)
formulas <- c(
  "ed_visits ~ sin_doy + cos_doy + (1 | Region)",  
  "ed_visits ~ sin_doy + cos_doy + (sin_doy + cos_doy + 1 | Region)",  
  "ed_visits ~ heat_index + (1 | Region)",
  "ed_visits ~ heat_index + (heat_index + 1 | Region)",
  "ed_visits ~ sin_doy + cos_doy + heat_index + (1 | Region)",  
  "ed_visits ~ sin_doy + cos_doy + heat_index + (heat_index + 1 | Region)",  
  "ed_visits ~ sin_doy + cos_doy + heat_index + (sin_doy + cos_doy+ 1 | Region)",  
  "ed_visits ~ sin_doy + cos_doy + heat_index + (heat_index + sin_doy + cos_doy + 1 | Region)",  

  # Models with vulnerbilities as fixed 
  "ed_visits ~ sin_doy + cos_doy + heat_index + nonwhite_percentage + Forest.Coverage + eldery_percentage + (heat_index + 1 | Region)", 
  "ed_visits ~ sin_doy + cos_doy + heat_index + nonwhite_percentage + Forest.Coverage + eldery_percentage + (sin_doy + cos_doy + 1 | Region)",
  "ed_visits ~ sin_doy + cos_doy + heat_index + nonwhite_percentage + Forest.Coverage + eldery_percentage + (heat_index + sin_doy + cos_doy + 1 | Region)"
)

families <- list(
  nbinom2 = nbinom2(link = "log"),
  poisson = poisson(link = "log")
)


```

```{r}
set.seed(777)
n <- nrow(merged)
train_n <- floor(0.8 * n)
merged <- merged[order(merged$Date), ]

train_data <- merged[1:train_n, ]
test_data <- merged[(train_n + 1):n, ]

results <- data.frame(
  formula = character(),
  family = character(),
  AIC = numeric(),
  BIC = numeric(),
  deviance = numeric(),
  MSE = numeric(),
  ICC_adjusted = numeric(),
  ICC_unadjusted = numeric()
)

# count <- 0

for (fam_name in names(families)) {
  fam_obj <- families[[fam_name]]

  for (fml in formulas) {
    model <- glmmTMB(as.formula(fml), family = fam_obj, data = train_data)

    preds <- predict(model, newdata = test_data, type = "response")
    actual <- test_data$ed_visits
    mse <- mean((preds - actual)^2)

    icc_vals <- tryCatch(
      performance::icc(model), 
      error = function(e) NA
    )
    
    icc_adjusted <- if (is.data.frame(icc_vals)) icc_vals$ICC_adjusted else NA
    icc_unadjusted <- if (is.data.frame(icc_vals)) icc_vals$ICC_conditional else NA

    results <- results |> add_row(
      formula = fml,
      family = fam_name,
      AIC = AIC(model),
      BIC = BIC(model),
      deviance = deviance(model),
      MSE = mse,
      ICC_adjusted = icc_adjusted,
      ICC_unadjusted = icc_unadjusted
    )
    # count <- count + 1     
    # if (count == 3) {
    #   break                
    # }
  }
}

results <- results |> arrange(MSE)
results
results |> arrange(BIC)

```

|  |
|:-----------------------------------------------------------------------|
| ed_visits \~ sin_doy + cos_doy + (heat_index + sin_doy + cos_doy + 1 \| Region) yields best result |

```{r}
# Poisson 
model1 <- glmmTMB(
  ed_visits ~ sin_doy + cos_doy + heat_index + (heat_index + 1 | Region),
  family = poisson(link = "log"),
  data = train_data
)
performance::icc(model1)

df <- performance::icc(model1)
is.data.frame(df)
df$ICC_adjusted
df$ICC_conditional


pred1 <- predict(model1, newdata = test_data, type = "response", se.fit = TRUE)

ci_lower1 <- pred1$fit - 1.96 * pred1$se.fit
ci_upper1 <- pred1$fit + 1.96 * pred1$se.fit

library(ggplot2)
test_data$pred1 <- pred1$fit
test_data$lower1 <- ci_lower1
test_data$upper1 <- ci_upper1

ggplot(test_data, aes(x = Date, y = ed_visits)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_line(aes(y = pred1), color = "blue") +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower1, ymax = upper1), alpha = 0.1, fill = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Poisson: Predicted ED Visits with 95% CI") +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(test_data, aes(x = Date, y = ed_visits)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_line(aes(y = pred1), color = "blue") +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower1, ymax = upper1), alpha = 0.1, fill = "blue") +
  facet_wrap(~ Region, nrow = 5) +  # One panel per region
  ggtitle("Poisson: Predicted ED Visits with 95% CI by Region") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
# Nbinom 
model2 <- glmmTMB(
  ed_visits ~ sin_doy + cos_doy + heat_index + (heat_index + sin_doy + cos_doy + 1 | Region)	,
  family = nbinom2(link = "log"),
  data = train_data
)
icc2 <- icc(model2)
icc2$ICC_adjusted
pred2 <- predict(model2, newdata = test_data, type = "response", se.fit = TRUE)

ci_lower2 <- pred2$fit - 1.96 * pred2$se.fit
ci_upper2 <- pred2$fit + 1.96 * pred2$se.fit

test_data$pred2 <- pred2$fit
test_data$lower2 <- ci_lower2
test_data$upper2 <- ci_upper2

ggplot(test_data, aes(x = Date, y = ed_visits)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_line(aes(y = pred2), color = "blue") +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower2, ymax = upper2), alpha = 0.1, fill = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Negative Binomial: Predicted ED Visits with 95% CI") +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(test_data, aes(x = Date, y = ed_visits)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_line(aes(y = pred2), color = "blue") +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower2, ymax = upper2), alpha = 0.1, fill = "blue") +
  facet_wrap(~ Region, nrow = 5) +  # One panel per region
  ggtitle("Negative Binomial: Predicted ED Visits with 95% CI by Region") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
library(glmmTMB)
full_model <- glmmTMB(
  ed_visits ~ sin_doy + cos_doy + heat_index + nonwhite_percentage + Forest.Coverage + eldery_percentage + (heat_index + sin_doy + cos_doy + 1 | Region),
  family = nbinom2(link = "log"),
  data = train_data
)
simple_model <- glmmTMB(
  ed_visits ~ sin_doy + cos_doy + heat_index + (heat_index + sin_doy + cos_doy + 1 | Region),
  family = nbinom2(link = "log"),
  data = train_data
)
anova(simple_model, full_model)
```

Shared slide between temp and HI model on seasonality and modeling

Individual slides on the model reuslt

Also include peak and amplitute and .....

Go on **Master References Review Status.gsheet** in the box for lit
reviews
